title: WIP: Add annotation to show result on e2e fail
body:
These tests flaked at least once while executing under Cirrus CI.  It
was not obvious from the error why this happened.  Add an annotation to
these tests to give more debugging detail if they ever fail again.
    
Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Hmmm, gunna fail again.  

``test/e2e/pod_top_test.go:115:5: cannot use result (type int) as type float64 in argument to ginkgo.It``

Maybe I don't need to declare the result variable first (at the top)?
